title: Thanos
description: Thanos documents installation material for Thanos in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the observability-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Architecture, and 설치, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include install, infrastructure, and observability, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / observability / thanos / install / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
